docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF DE VIZCARRA, JAIME
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,120.00 FILED BY DE VIZCARRA, JAIME AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED APR-11-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTORETURN
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE VIZCARRA, JAIME

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JAIME DE VIZCARRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VICE PRESIDENT TOWING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE VIZCARRA, JAIME IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUTORETURN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
